message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Administrative" as Administrative
participant ":AddScooterUI" as AddScooterUI
participant ":AddScooterController" as AddScooterController
participant ":Pharmacy" as Pharmacy
participant "ls:ListScooters" as lsListScooters
participant "sc:Scooter" as scScooter
participant "bat:Battery" as batBattery
participant "scdb:ScooterDB" as scdbScooterDB
participant "batdb:BatteryDB" as batdbBatteryDB

Administrative -> AddScooterUI: 1 begins the process of adding a scooter
AddScooterUI --> Administrative: 2 asks for the necessary data(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
Administrative -> AddScooterUI: 3 inserts the solicited data
AddScooterUI -> AddScooterController: 4 newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
AddScooterController -> Pharmacy: 5 ls = getListScooters()
AddScooterController -> lsListScooters: 6 sc=newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
lsListScooters -> scScooter: 7 create(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
scScooter -> batBattery: 8 create(id_Battery, capacity)
batBattery --> batBattery: 9 validateBattery(bat)
AddScooterController -> lsListScooters: 10 validateScooter(sc)
lsListScooters --> AddScooterUI: 11 validates the data, presents it and asks the administrator for its confirmation
Administrative -> AddScooterUI: 12 confirms
AddScooterUI -> AddScooterController: 13 registerScooter()
AddScooterController -> lsListScooters: 14 registerScooter(sc)
lsListScooters -> lsListScooters: 15 validateScooter(sc)
lsListScooters -> lsListScooters: 16 addScooter(sc)
lsListScooters -> scScooter: 17 save(sc)
scScooter -> scdbScooterDB: 18 save(sc)
scScooter -> batdbBatteryDB: 19 save(bat)
AddScooterUI --> Administrative: 20 adds the scooter to a list of scooters

@enduml
```
